# Codex HUD

> Open-source macOS menu bar HUD for OpenAI Codex.

## Canonical URLs

- Repo: https://github.com/Pangu-Immortal/codex-hud
- README: https://github.com/Pangu-Immortal/codex-hud/blob/main/README.md
- Architecture: https://github.com/Pangu-Immortal/codex-hud/blob/main/docs/architecture.md
- Data Sources: https://github.com/Pangu-Immortal/codex-hud/blob/main/docs/data-sources.md
- FAQ: https://github.com/Pangu-Immortal/codex-hud/blob/main/docs/faq.md

## Summary

Codex HUD is a native SwiftUI + AppKit macOS menu bar app that monitors local OpenAI Codex activity. It reads:

- active Codex processes from `ps` and `lsof`
- thread and agent state from `~/.codex/state_5.sqlite`
- warnings and errors from `~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite`
- active workspaces from `~/.codex/.codex-global-state.json`

## Key Facts

- It is for OpenAI Codex on macOS.
- It is not an official OpenAI product.
- It is focused on observability, not chat.
- It estimates background agent count by merging multiple local signals.
- It can export diagnostics JSON and generate a README screenshot.

## Recommended Reads

- `README.md`
- `docs/architecture.md`
- `docs/data-sources.md`
- `docs/faq.md`
